title: Final Oscar Predictions: Best Actor — Michael B. Jordan and Leonardo DiCaprio Gain Late Momentum as Timothée Chalamet Fades
text: Clayton Davis reports on the Best Actor race at the 2026 Oscars. Will Win: Michael B. Jordan, Sinners. Could Win: Ethan Hawke, Blue Moon. Should Win: Wagner Moura, The Secret Agent. Michael B. Jordan's victory at The Actor Awards significantly boosted his Oscar prospects. The commentary notes that Michael B. Jordan's win at The Actor Awards was critical to both his campaign and his film's broader trajectory in the best picture race. Timothée Chalamet's chances have diminished considerably. His campaign style drew criticism from industry professionals and voters alike, positioning him similarly to other early-season frontrunners who ultimately fell short. Leonardo DiCaprio maintains strong Academy support for One Battle After Another, while veteran Ethan Hawke for Blue Moon retains genuine industry affection. Wagner Moura's earlier Golden Globe win for The Secret Agent keeps him viable despite missing other major nominations. The analysis emphasizes that momentum matters in the final stretch of Oscar season, with Jordan currently holding the advantage.
